title: Oru Pennai Parthu Nilavai Lyrics Dheiva Thaai

Oru Pennai Parthu Nilavai Lyrics Dheiva Thaai
#TMS #Vaali #MGR

oru pennai paathu
nilavai paarthaen
nilavil kulir illai.

aval kannai paarthu
malarai paarthen
malaril oli illai.

aval illaamal naan illai
naan illaamal aval illai
aval illaamal naan illai
naan illaamal aval illai

kodi minnal pol
oru paarvai.
maano meeno endrirundhen.

oru pennai paathu
nilavai paarthaen
nilavil kulir illai.

aval kannai paarthu
malarai paarthen
malaril oli illai.

aval illaamal naan illai
naan illaamal aval illai
aval illaamal naan illai
naan illaamal aval illai

kalai annam pol
oru thottram
idaiyil idaiyo kidayaadhu.

oru pennai paathu
nilavai paarthaen
nilavil kulir illai.

aval kannai paarthu
malarai paarthen

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, highlighting the emotional connection between two individuals.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie Dheiva Thaai.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by T.M. Soundararajan, a legendary playback singer in Tamil cinema.

When was this song released?

The song was released on July 18, 1970.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Pennai Parthu Nilavai, the protagonist reflects on the profound impact of love and the emptiness felt in the absence of a beloved. The song's melancholic yet romantic tone evokes a sense of nostalgia, making it relatable to anyone who has experienced heartache. Set against the backdrop of Dheiva Thaai, it beautifully conveys the emotions of longing and desire. The heartfelt lyrics and melody create an atmosphere that resonates with listeners, leaving a lasting impression.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Pennai Parthu Nilavai from Dheiva Thaai is a timeless classic that beautifully captures the essence of longing and love. With its poignant lyrics and soulful melody, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of romance. The collaboration of T.M. Soundararajan's powerful vocals and Vaali's evocative lyrics makes this track an unforgettable gem in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: I saw a girl and felt there is no coolness in the sky.
I looked into her eyes and saw flowers, but there is no light in the flowers.
Without her, I am nothing; without me, she is nothing. Without her, I am nothing; without me, she is nothing.
Like a lightning strike, one glance. I was lost in thoughts.
Like a cuckoo's voice, one word, I was lost in music.
When the heart connects with another heart, it becomes a fire when it connects with the earth.
If today love is given, tomorrow will it be taken?
I saw a girl and felt there is no coolness in the sky.
I looked into her eyes and saw flowers, but there is no light in the flowers.
Without her, I am nothing; without me, she is nothing. Without her, I am nothing; without me, she is nothing.
Like a morning sun, a shadow cannot exist in the same place.
Like a statue, her body cannot have any flaws.
If I connect with myself, I connect with her.
If today love is given, tomorrow will it be taken?
I saw a girl and felt there is no coolness in the sky.
I looked into her eyes and saw flowers, but there is no light in the flowers.
Without her, I am nothing; without me, she is nothing. Without her, I am nothing; without me, she is nothing.
